title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Godrej Properties

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Godrej Properties
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Properties are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Agra. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Properties:
Godrej Properties is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Properties!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
